name: my-assistent-ai
description: Testing local LLM models using node-llama-cpp

scripts.build:auto: node -e "const {execSync} = require('child_process'); try { execSync('nvidia-smi', {stdio: 'ignore'}); console.log('GPU detected, building with CUDA'); execSync('npm run build:cuda', {stdio: 'inherit'}); } catch { try { execSync('which glslc', {stdio: 'ignore'}); console.log('Vulkan SDK detected, building with Vulkan'); execSync('npm run build:vulkan', {stdio: 'inherit'}); } catch { console.log('No GPU SDK detected, building with CPU'); execSync('npm run build:cpu', {stdio: 'inherit'}); } } }"
